---
title: "Brevet 200 Vuelta San Pedro"
date: "2026-01-17"
categories: 
  - ciclismo
---

:::: {.tabla_ciclismo}
| Variable                | Valor     |
|------------------------:|-----------|
|**Distancia total:**     | 208.87 km |
|**Ascenso acumulado**    | 2,007 m   |
|**Velocidad promedio:**  | 21.3 km/h |
|**Tiempo en movimiento** | 9:48:12   |
|**Tiempo total**         | 14:48:11  |
::::

<div class="strava-embed-placeholder" data-embed-type="activity" data-embed-id="17087633676" data-style="standard"></div><script src="https://strava-embeds.com/embed.js"></script>
